_comment: Canonical request payload shapes for internal API communication between g8ee and VSOD. These models ensure wire compatibility for internal management and event delivery operations.

sse_push._description: Payload for POST /api/internal/sse/push. g8ee pushes an SSE event to VSOD for delivery to a web session.

web_session_id.description: Target web session ID for the event

event.description: The SSE event payload to be delivered

intent_request._description: Payload for granting or revoking intents for an operator.

unlock_account._description: Payload for unlocking a user account.

user_id.description: ID of the user to unlock
